features.name: Bonus Feat
features.description: One extra feat at 1st level.

features.name: Extra Skill Points
features.description: 4 extra skill points at 1st level, 1 extra skill point at each additional level.

features.name: Gnome Weapon Familiarity
features.description: Treat gnome hooked hammers as martial weapons.

features.name: Low-Light Vision
features.description: See twice as far as a human in dim light.

features.name: Gnomish Illusion Affinity
features.description: +1 to saving throw DCs for illusion spells.

features.name: Gnomish Rancor
features.description: +1 racial bonus on attack rolls against kobolds and goblinoids.

features.name: Gnomish Giantfighting
features.description: +4 dodge bonus to AC against giants.

features.name: Gnomish Skills
features.description: +2 racial bonus on Craft (alchemy) and Listen checks.

features.name: Gnomish Spell-Like Abilities
features.description: 1/day—speak with animals, dancing lights, ghost sound, prestidigitation (Min Cha 10).

features.name: Darkvision
features.description: See up to 60 feet in total darkness.

features.name: Low-Light Vision
features.description: See twice as far as a human in dim light.

features.name: Darkvision
features.description: See up to 60 feet in total darkness.

features.name: Stonecunning
features.description: +2 racial bonus on Search checks to notice unusual stonework.

features.name: Dwarven Weapon Familiarity
features.description: Treat dwarven waraxes and dwarven urgroashes as martial weapons.

features.name: Stability
features.description: +4 bonus on stability checks to resist bull rush or trip.

features.name: Dwarven Poison Resistance
features.description: +2 racial bonus on saving throws against poison.

features.name: Dwarven Spell Resistance
features.description: +2 racial bonus on saving throws against spells.

features.name: Dwarven Rancor
features.description: +1 racial bonus on attack rolls against orcs and goblinoids.

features.name: Dwarven Giantfighting
features.description: +4 dodge bonus to AC against giants.

features.name: Dwarven Skills
features.description: +2 racial bonus on Appraise and Craft checks related to stone or metal.

features.name: Elven Sleep Immunity
features.description: Immune to magic sleep effects, +2 saving throw bonus against enchantment spells.

features.name: Low-Light Vision
features.description: See twice as far as a human in dim light.

features.name: Elven Weapon Proficiency
features.description: Proficient with longsword, rapier, longbow, and shortbow.

features.name: Elven Senses
features.description: +2 racial bonus on Listen, Search, and Spot checks. Automatic Search if within 5 feet of secret door.

features.name: Elven Sleep Immunity
features.description: Immune to magic sleep effects, +2 saving throw bonus against enchantment spells.

features.name: Low-Light Vision
features.description: See twice as far as a human in dim light.

features.name: Half-Elven Senses
features.description: +1 racial bonus on Listen, Search, and Spot checks.

features.name: Half-Elven Skills
features.description: +2 racial bonus on Diplomacy and Gather Information checks.

features.name: Elven Blood
features.description: Treated as an elf for all racial effects.

features.name: Darkvision
features.description: See up to 60 feet in total darkness.

features.name: Orc Blood
features.description: Treated as an orc for all racial effects.

features.name: Halfling Skills
features.description: +2 racial bonus on Climb, Jump, Listen, and Move Silently checks.

features.name: Halfling Luck
features.description: +1 racial bonus on all saving throws.

features.name: Halfling Fearlessness
features.description: +2 morale bonus on saving throws against fear.

features.name: Halfling Thrown Weapon Mastery
features.description: +1 racial bonus on attack rolls with thrown weapons and slings.
